text:
is a book published by Kadokawa Shoten on 22 May 1997.

Overview

A mysterious boy named Kaworu Nagisa appears in front of Shinji who has closed his heart. But he was the last Angel to defeat. A paperback photo collection that reproduces the impressive scenes of "Neon Genesis Evangelion" centering on Kaworu with photos and dialogue.
